message.content: <local-command-caveat>Caveat: The messages below were generated by the user while running local commands. DO NOT respond to these messages or otherwise consider them in your response unless the user explicitly asks you to.</local-command-caveat>

SELECT
    courses.title,
    courses.description,
    courses.slug,
    courses.tags,
    courses.publish_status,
    courses.category_id,
    courses.published_at,
    courses.author_id,
    courses.visibility,
    json_agg(sections) AS sections
FROM
    courses
    JOIN (
        SELECT
            course_sections.course_id,
            course_section_id,
            course_sections.title,
            course_sections.description,
            json_agg(
                json_build_object(
                    'course_section_topic_id',
                    course_section_topic_id,
                    'title',
                    course_section_topics.title,
                    'description',
                    course_section_topics.description,
                    'prerequisites',
                    course_section_topics.prerequisites,
                    'knowledge',
                    course_section_topics.knowledge,
                    'flow',
                    course_section_topics.flow,
                    'quiz',
                    course_section_topics.quiz,
                    'completion_criteria',
                    course_section_topics.completion_criteria
                )
                ORDER BY
                    course_section_topics."index" ASC
            ) AS topics
        FROM
            course_sections
            JOIN course_section_topics USING (course_section_id)
        GROUP BY
            course_section_topics.course_id,
            course_section_id
        ORDER BY
            course_section_id ASC,
            course_sections.index ASC
    ) AS sections USING (course_id)
GROUP BY
    courses.course_id クエリの効率どう？改善点ある？

content.text:
いくつか問題点があります。

## 問題点

### 1. サブクエリ内の `ORDER BY` は無効
```sql
-- ここのORDER BYはPostgreSQLでは保証されない（派生テーブルは順序を持たない）
ORDER BY
    course_section_id ASC,
    course_sections.index ASC  -- ← 効果なし
```

### 2. 外側の `json_agg(sections)` に ORDER BY がない
セクションの順序が不定になる。`sections.index` で並べるべき：
```sql
json_agg(sections ORDER BY sections."index" ASC)
```

### 3. `json_agg(sections)` が余分なフィールドを含む
`sections` をそのまま渡すと `course_id` も含まれてしまう。`json_build_object` で必要なフィールドのみ指定すべき。

### 4. `GROUP BY course_section_topics.course_id` が怪しい
`course_section_id` でJOINしているため、`course_section_topics` に `course_id` がないなら参照エラーになるはず。`course_sections.course_id` が正しい。

---

## 改善案

```sql
SELECT
    courses.title,
    courses.description,
    courses.slug,
    courses.tags,
    courses.publish_status,
    courses.category_id,
    courses.published_at,
    courses.author_id,
    courses.visibility,
    json_agg(
        json_build_object(
            'course_section_id', sections.course_section_id,
            'title',             sections.title,
            'description',       sections.description,
            'topics',            sections.topics
        )
        ORDER BY sections."index" ASC  -- ← 順序を保証
    ) AS sections
FROM
    courses
    JOIN (
        SELECT
            course_sections.course_id,
            course_section_id,
            course_sections.title,
            course_sections.description,
            course_sections."index",
            json_agg(
                json_build_object(
                    'course_section_topic_id', course_section_topic_id,
                    'title',                   course_section_topics.title,
                    'description',             course_section_topics.description,
                    'prerequisites',           course_section_topics.prerequisites,
                    'knowledge',               course_section_topics.knowledge,
                    'flow',                    course_section_topics.flow,
                    'quiz',                    course_section_topics.quiz,
                    'completion_criteria',     course_section_topics.completion_criteria
                )
                ORDER BY course_section_topics."index" ASC
            ) AS topics
        FROM
            course_sections
            JOIN course_section_topics USING (course_section_id)
        GROUP BY
            course_sections.course_id,  -- ← course_sections から参照
            course_section_id
    ) AS sections USING (course_id)
GROUP BY
    courses.course_id
```

変更点まとめ：
- サブクエリ内の無意味な `ORDER BY` を削除
- 外側の `json_agg` に `ORDER BY sections."index"` を追加
- `json_agg(sections)` → `json_build_object` で必要フィールドのみ
- `course_section_topics.course_id` → `course_sections.course_id`
- `course_sections."index"` をサブクエリで SELECT に追加（外側で ORDER BY するため）

1→CREATE EXTENSION ltree;
     2→
     3→CREATE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at()
     4→RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
     5→BEGIN
     6→  NEW._updated_at := NOW();
     7→  RETURN NEW;
     8→END;
     9→$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
    10→
    11→CREATE TABLE categories (
    12→    category_id UUID,
    13→    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    14→    path ltree NOT NULL,
    15→
    16→    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    17→    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    18→
    19→    CONSTRAINT pk_categories PRIMARY KEY (category_id)
    20→);
    21→
    22→CREATE INDEX idx_categories_path ON categories USING gist (path);
    23→
    24→CREATE TABLE authors (
    25→    author_id UUID,
    26→    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    27→    profile TEXT NOT NULL,
    28→
    29→    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    30→    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    31→
    32→    CONSTRAINT pk_authors PRIMARY KEY (author_id)
    33→);
    34→
    35→CREATE TABLE courses (
    36→    course_id UUID,
    37→    title TEXT NOT NULL,
    38→    description TEXT NOT NULL,
    39→    slug TEXT NOT NULL,
    40→    tags JSONB NOT NULL,
    41→    publish_status TEXT NOT NULL,
    42→    category_id UUID NOT NULL,
    43→    published_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    44→    author_id UUID NOT NULL,
    45→    visibility TEXT NOT NULL,
    46→
    47→    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    48→    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    49→
    50→    CONSTRAINT pk_courses PRIMARY KEY (course_id),
    51→    CONSTRAINT fk_courses_category_id FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES categories(category_id),
    52→    CONSTRAINT fk_courses_author_id FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES authors(author_id),
    53→    CONSTRAINT uq_courses_slug_author_id UNIQUE (slug, author_id)
    54→);
    55→
    56→CREATE INDEX idx_courses_category_id ON courses USING btree (category_id);
    57→CREATE INDEX idx_courses_author_id ON courses USING btree (author_id);
    58→CREATE INDEX idx_courses_tags ON courses USING gin (tags);
    59→
    60→COMMENT ON COLUMN courses.publish_status IS 'draft / published / archived';
    61→COMMENT ON COLUMN courses.visibility IS 'private = 自分のみ, public = 誰でも閲覧可, paid = 購入者のみ';
    62→
    63→CREATE TRIGGER trigger_courses_meta_updated_at
    64→    BEFORE UPDATE ON courses
    65→    FOR EACH ROW
    66→    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();
    67→
    68→CREATE TRIGGER trigger_categories_meta_updated_at
    69→    BEFORE UPDATE ON categories
    70→    FOR EACH ROW
    71→    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();
    72→
    73→CREATE TRIGGER trigger_authors_meta_updated_at
    74→    BEFORE UPDATE ON authors
    75→    FOR EACH ROW
    76→    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();
    77→

1→-- USERS
     2→CREATE TABLE users (
     3→    user_id UUID,
     4→    nickname TEXT NOT NULL,
     5→    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
     6→    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
     7→    CONSTRAINT pk_users PRIMARY KEY (user_id)
     8→);
     9→
    10→CREATE TRIGGER trigger_users_meta_updated_at BEFORE
    11→UPDATE
    12→    ON users FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();
    13→
    14→-- APIKEYS
    15→CREATE TABLE apikeys (
    16→    key_hash TEXT,
    17→    user_id UUID NOT NULL,
    18→    plain_suffix TEXT NOT NULL,
    19→    expired_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
    20→    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    21→    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    22→    CONSTRAINT pk_apikeys PRIMARY KEY (key_hash),
    23→    CONSTRAINT fk_apikeys_user_id FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id)
    24→);
    25→
    26→CREATE INDEX idx_apikeys_user_id ON apikeys USING BTREE (user_id);
    27→
    28→CREATE TRIGGER trigger_apikeys_meta_updated_at BEFORE
    29→UPDATE
    30→    ON apikeys FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();
    31→
    32→-- COURSE SECTION
    33→CREATE TABLE course_sections (
    34→    course_section_id UUID,
    35→    course_id UUID NOT NULL,
    36→    index SMALLINT NOT NULL,
    37→    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    38→    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    39→    CONSTRAINT pk_course_sections PRIMARY KEY (course_section_id),
    40→    CONSTRAINT fk_course_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY (course_id) REFERENCES courses(course_id),
    41→    CONSTRAINT uq_course_sections_course_id_index UNIQUE (course_id, index) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
    42→);
    43→
    44→CREATE INDEX idx_course_sections_course_id ON course_sections USING BTREE (course_id);
    45→
    46→CREATE TRIGGER trigger_course_sections_meta_updated_at BEFORE
    47→UPDATE
    48→    ON course_sections FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();
    49→
    50→-- COURSE SECTION TOPIC
    51→CREATE TABLE course_section_topics (
    52→    course_section_topic_id UUID,
    53→    -- course_id は course_section と JOIN することで辿れるが、クエリ効率のため非正規化
    54→    course_id UUID NOT NULL,
    55→    course_section_id UUID NOT NULL,
    56→    index SMALLINT NOT NULL,
    57→    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    58→    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    59→    CONSTRAINT pk_course_section_topics PRIMARY KEY (course_section_topic_id),
    60→    CONSTRAINT fk_course_section_topics_course_id FOREIGN KEY (course_id) REFERENCES courses(course_id),
    61→    CONSTRAINT fk_course_section_topics_course_section_id FOREIGN KEY (course_section_id) REFERENCES course_sections(course_section_id),
    62→    CONSTRAINT uq_course_section_topics_course_section_id_index UNIQUE (course_section_id, index) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
    63→);
    64→
    65→CREATE INDEX idx_course_section_topics_course_id ON course_section_topics USING BTREE (course_id);
    66→
    67→CREATE INDEX idx_course_section_topics_course_section_id ON course_section_topics USING BTREE (course_section_id);
    68→
    69→CREATE TRIGGER trigger_course_section_topics_meta_updated_at BEFORE
    70→UPDATE
    71→    ON course_section_topics FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();
    72→
    73→CREATE TABLE user_topic_progresses (
    74→    -- クエリ効率のため非正規化
    75→    course_id UUID NOT NULL,
    76→    course_section_id UUID NOT NULL,
    77→    course_section_topic_id UUID NOT NULL,
    78→    user_id UUID NOT NULL,
    79→    status TEXT NOT NULL,
    80→    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    81→    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    82→    CONSTRAINT pk_user_topic_progresses PRIMARY KEY (course_section_topic_id, user_id),
    83→    CONSTRAINT fk_course_id FOREIGN KEY (course_id) REFERENCES courses(course_id),
    84→    CONSTRAINT fk_course_section_id FOREIGN KEY (course_section_id) REFERENCES course_sections(course_section_id),
    85→    CONSTRAINT fk_course_section_topic_id FOREIGN KEY (course_section_topic_id) REFERENCES course_section_topics(course_section_topic_id),
    86→    CONSTRAINT fk_user_id FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id)
    87→);
    88→
    89→COMMENT ON COLUMN user_topic_progresses.status IS 'IN_PROGRESS = 開始済み, COMPLETED = 完了済み, 開始していない場合はレコード自体がないので値として持たない';
    90→
    91→CREATE INDEX idx_user_topic_progresses_course_id ON user_topic_progresses USING BTREE (course_id);
    92→
    93→CREATE INDEX idx_user_topic_progresses_course_section_id ON user_topic_progresses USING BTREE (course_section_id);
    94→
    95→CREATE INDEX idx_user_topic_progresses_course_section_topic_id ON user_topic_progresses USING BTREE (course_section_id);
    96→
    97→CREATE INDEX idx_user_topic_progresses_user_id ON user_topic_progresses USING BTREE (user_id);
    98→
    99→CREATE TRIGGER trigger_user_topic_progress_meta_updated_at BEFORE
   100→UPDATE
   101→    ON user_topic_progresses FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();
   102→

But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

file.content:
-- USERS
CREATE TABLE users (
    user_id UUID,
    nickname TEXT NOT NULL,
    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    CONSTRAINT pk_users PRIMARY KEY (user_id)
);

CREATE TRIGGER trigger_users_meta_updated_at BEFORE
UPDATE
    ON users FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();

-- APIKEYS
CREATE TABLE apikeys (
    key_hash TEXT,
    user_id UUID NOT NULL,
    plain_suffix TEXT NOT NULL,
    expired_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    CONSTRAINT pk_apikeys PRIMARY KEY (key_hash),
    CONSTRAINT fk_apikeys_user_id FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_apikeys_user_id ON apikeys USING BTREE (user_id);

CREATE TRIGGER trigger_apikeys_meta_updated_at BEFORE
UPDATE
    ON apikeys FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();

-- COURSE SECTION
CREATE TABLE course_sections (
    course_section_id UUID,
    course_id UUID NOT NULL,
    index SMALLINT NOT NULL,
    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    CONSTRAINT pk_course_sections PRIMARY KEY (course_section_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_course_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY (course_id) REFERENCES courses(course_id),
    CONSTRAINT uq_course_sections_course_id_index UNIQUE (course_id, index) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
);

CREATE INDEX idx_course_sections_course_id ON course_sections USING BTREE (course_id);

CREATE TRIGGER trigger_course_sections_meta_updated_at BEFORE
UPDATE
    ON course_sections FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();

-- COURSE SECTION TOPIC
CREATE TABLE course_section_topics (
    course_section_topic_id UUID,
    -- course_id は course_section と JOIN することで辿れるが、クエリ効率のため非正規化
    course_id UUID NOT NULL,
    course_section_id UUID NOT NULL,
    index SMALLINT NOT NULL,
    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    CONSTRAINT pk_course_section_topics PRIMARY KEY (course_section_topic_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_course_section_topics_course_id FOREIGN KEY (course_id) REFERENCES courses(course_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_course_section_topics_course_section_id FOREIGN KEY (course_section_id) REFERENCES course_sections(course_section_id),
    CONSTRAINT uq_course_section_topics_course_section_id_index UNIQUE (course_section_id, index) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
);

CREATE INDEX idx_course_section_topics_course_id ON course_section_topics USING BTREE (course_id);

CREATE INDEX idx_course_section_topics_course_section_id ON course_section_topics USING BTREE (course_section_id);

CREATE TRIGGER trigger_course_section_topics_meta_updated_at BEFORE
UPDATE
    ON course_section_topics FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();

CREATE TABLE user_topic_progresses (
    -- クエリ効率のため非正規化
    course_id UUID NOT NULL,
    course_section_id UUID NOT NULL,
    course_section_topic_id UUID NOT NULL,
    user_id UUID NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL,
    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    CONSTRAINT pk_user_topic_progresses PRIMARY KEY (course_section_topic_id, user_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_course_id FOREIGN KEY (course_id) REFERENCES courses(course_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_course_section_id FOREIGN KEY (course_section_id) REFERENCES course_sections(course_section_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_course_section_topic_id FOREIGN KEY (course_section_topic_id) REFERENCES course_section_topics(course_section_topic_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_user_id FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id)
);

COMMENT ON COLUMN user_topic_progresses.status IS 'IN_PROGRESS = 開始済み, COMPLETED = 完了済み, 開始していない場合はレコード自体がないので値として持たない';

CREATE INDEX idx_user_topic_progresses_course_id ON user_topic_progresses USING BTREE (course_id);

CREATE INDEX idx_user_topic_progresses_course_section_id ON user_topic_progresses USING BTREE (course_section_id);

CREATE INDEX idx_user_topic_progresses_course_section_topic_id ON user_topic_progresses USING BTREE (course_section_id);

CREATE INDEX idx_user_topic_progresses_user_id ON user_topic_progresses USING BTREE (user_id);

CREATE TRIGGER trigger_user_topic_progress_meta_updated_at BEFORE
UPDATE
    ON user_topic_progresses FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();

file.content:
-- name: GetCourses :many
SELECT
    course_id,
    title
FROM
    courses
WHERE
    (
        courses.publish_status = 'published'
        AND courses.visibility IN ('public', 'paid')
    )
    AND (
        @Cursor :: uuid IS NULL
        OR course_id > @Cursor
    )
    AND (
        NULLIF(@Keyword :: text, '') IS NULL
        OR title LIKE '%' || @Keyword || '%'
        OR description LIKE '%' || @Keyword || '%'
    )
ORDER BY
    course_id
LIMIT
    @Size;

-- name: GetCourseById :one
SELECT
    courses.title,
    courses.description,
    courses.slug,
    courses.tags,
    courses.publish_status,
    courses.category_id,
    courses.published_at,
    courses.author_id,
    courses.visibility,
    json_agg(
        json_build_object(
            'course_section_id',
            sections.course_section_id,
            'title',
            sections.title,
            'description',
            sections.description,
            'topics',
            sections.topics
        )
        ORDER BY
            sections."index" ASC -- ← 順序を保証
    ) AS sections
FROM
    courses
    JOIN (
        SELECT
            course_sections.course_id,
            course_section_id,
            course_sections.title,
            course_sections.description,
            course_sections."index",
            json_agg(
                json_build_object(
                    'course_section_topic_id',
                    course_section_topic_id,
                    'title',
                    course_section_topics.title,
                    'description',
                    course_section_topics.description,
                    'prerequisites',
                    course_section_topics.prerequisites,
                    'knowledge',
                    course_section_topics.knowledge,
                    'flow',
                    course_section_topics.flow,
                    'quiz',
                    course_section_topics.quiz,
                    'completion_criteria',
                    course_section_topics.completion_criteria
                )
                ORDER BY
                    course_section_topics."index" ASC
            ) AS topics
        FROM
            course_sections
            JOIN course_section_topics USING (course_section_id)
        GROUP BY
            course_sections.course_id,
            -- ← course_sections から参照
            course_section_id
    ) AS sections USING (course_id)
GROUP BY
    courses.course_id;

-- name: GetCourses :many
SELECT
    course_id,
    title
FROM
    courses
WHERE
    (
        courses.publish_status = 'published'
        AND courses.visibility IN ('public', 'paid')
    )
    AND (
        @Cursor :: uuid IS NULL
        OR course_id > @Cursor
    )
    AND (
        NULLIF(@Keyword :: text, '') IS NULL
        OR title LIKE '%' || @Keyword || '%'
        OR description LIKE '%' || @Keyword || '%'
    )
ORDER BY
    course_id
LIMIT
    @Size;

-- name: GetCourseById :one
SELECT
    courses.title,
    courses.description,
    courses.slug,
    courses.tags,
    courses.publish_status,
    courses.category_id,
    courses.published_at,
    courses.author_id,
    courses.visibility,
    json_agg(
        json_build_object(
            'course_section_id',
            sections.course_section_id,
            'title',
            sections.title,
            'description',
            sections.description,
            'topics',
            sections.topics
        )
        ORDER BY
            sections."index" ASC -- ← 順序を保証
    ) AS sections
FROM
    courses
    JOIN (
        SELECT
            course_sections.course_id,
            course_section_id,
            course_sections.title,
            course_sections.description,
            course_sections."index",
            json_agg(
                json_build_object(
                    'course_section_topic_id',
                    course_section_topic_id,
                    'title',
                    course_section_topics.title,
                    'description',
                    course_section_topics.description,
                    'prerequisites',
                    course_section_topics.prerequisites,
                    'knowledge',
                    course_section_topics.knowledge,
                    'flow',
                    course_section_topics.flow,
                    'quiz',
                    course_section_topics.quiz,
                    'completion_criteria',
                    course_section_topics.completion_criteria
                )
                ORDER BY
                    course_section_topics."index" ASC
            ) AS topics
        FROM
            course_sections
            JOIN course_section_topics USING (course_section_id)
        GROUP BY
            course_sections.course_id,
            -- ← course_sections から参照
            course_section_id
    ) AS sections USING (course_id)
GROUP BY
    courses.course_id;

-- name: GetCourses :many
SELECT
    course_id,
    title
FROM
    courses
WHERE
    (
        courses.publish_status = 'published'
        AND courses.visibility IN ('public', 'paid')
    )
    AND (
        @Cursor :: uuid IS NULL
        OR course_id > @Cursor
    )
    AND (
        NULLIF(@Keyword :: text, '') IS NULL
        OR title LIKE '%' || @Keyword || '%'
        OR description LIKE '%' || @Keyword || '%'
    )
ORDER BY
    course_id
LIMIT
    @Size;

-- name: GetCourseById :one
SELECT
    courses.title,
    courses.description,
    courses.slug,
    courses.tags,
    courses.publish_status,
    courses.category_id,
    categories.name AS category_name,
    courses.published_at,
    courses.author_id,
    authors.name AS author_name,
    courses.visibility,
    json_agg(
        json_build_object(
            'course_section_id',
            sections.course_section_id,
            'title',
            sections.title,
            'description',
            sections.description,
            'topics',
            sections.topics
        )
        ORDER BY
            sections."index" ASC
    ) AS sections
FROM
    courses
    JOIN categories USING (category_id)
    JOIN authors USING (author_id)
    JOIN (
        SELECT
            course_sections.course_id,
            course_section_id,
            course_sections.title,
            course_sections.description,
            course_sections."index",
            json_agg(
                json_build_object(
                    'course_section_topic_id',
                    course_section_topic_id,
                    'title',
                    course_section_topics.title,
                    'description',
                    course_section_topics.description,
                    'prerequisites',
                    course_section_topics.prerequisites,
                    'knowledge',
                    course_section_topics.knowledge,
                    'flow',
                    course_section_topics.flow,
                    'quiz',
                    course_section_topics.quiz,
                    'completion_criteria',
                    course_section_topics.completion_criteria
                )
                ORDER BY
                    course_section_topics."index" ASC
            ) AS topics
        FROM
            course_sections
            JOIN course_section_topics USING (course_section_id)
        GROUP BY
            course_sections.course_id,
            -- ← course_sections から参照
            course_section_id
    ) AS sections USING (course_id)
GROUP BY
    courses.course_id;
